betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Network Buses§f:
The §6Network Buses §fare §ecable parts§f that connect the ME network to adjacent inventories. Three main types cover most setups, plus fluid and oredict variants.

§6Bus Family§f:
- §bME Storage Bus §f(appliedenergistics2:part:220) — exposes an adjacent inventory to the network
- §bME Import Bus §f(appliedenergistics2:part:240) — pulls items from an adjacent inventory into the network
- §bME Export Bus §f(appliedenergistics2:part:260) — pushes items from the network into an adjacent inventory
- §bME Fluid Storage Bus §f(appliedenergistics2:part:221) — same as Storage Bus, but for fluids
- §bME Fluid Import Bus §f(appliedenergistics2:part:241) — fluid variant of Import Bus
- §bME Fluid Export Bus §f(appliedenergistics2:part:261) — fluid variant of Export Bus
- §bME OreDict Storage Bus §f(appliedenergistics2:part:222) — treats all §eOreDict§f-equivalent items as the same
- §bME Inverted Toggle Bus§f (appliedenergistics2:part:100) — see §6Toggle Buses§f

§6Production Path (network/parts/storage_bus.json)§f:
The §6ME Storage Bus §frecipe is:
- 1× §6Sticky Piston§f (minecraft:sticky_piston)
- 1× §6ME Interface§f (any variant of appliedenergistics2:interface)
- 1× §6Piston§f (minecraft:piston)
- Yields 1× ME Storage Bus (shapeless)

§6Import/Export Bus Recipes§f:
- §6ME Import Bus §f(network/parts/import_bus.json): pattern " a / bcb / ", with §ba§f = §6Annihilation Core§f, §bb§f = §6Iron Ingot§f (2), §cc§f = §6Sticky Piston§f — yields 1
- §6ME Export Bus §f(network/parts/export_bus.json): pattern "aba / c ", with §ba§f = §6Formation Core§f, §ba§f = §6Iron Ingot§f (2), §cc§f = §6Piston§f — yields 1

§6Function (PartStorageBus.java:89, PartImportBus.java:56, PartExportBus.java:63)§f:
- §bStorage Bus§f: the most common use; the network sees items in the adjacent inventory as if they were §6ME Storage Cells§f
- §bImport Bus§f: pulls items into the network; respects §6fuzzy mode§f and §6redstone control§f
- §bExport Bus§f: pushes items to the adjacent inventory; integrates with §6autocrafting§f via the §6MultiCraftingTracker§f
- §bOreDict Storage Bus§f: §bmatches by OreDict tag§f — useful for chests holding many equivalent items (e.g. dusts from different mods)

§6Placement and Upgrades§f:
- §eTip§f: place buses on the side of a §6ME Cable §ffacing the target inventory
- §6Acceleration Card§f speeds up Import/Export (1 card = 1.6× throughput)
- §6Inverter Card§f inverts fuzzy/priority matching on a Storage Bus
- §cWarning§f: Export Buses do not block §bitem duplication§f; gate them with a §6Level Emitter §fif duplication is a concern
